1875370.name: Little Islanders
1875370.description:
WELCOME TO LITTLE ISLANDERS


Little Islanders is a God Game with City Building, Survival, and Colony Sim elements featuring individually unique simulated settlers. Set in a magical world where landmasses hang airborne amongst the clouds, people call these islands their home.

Outlast the elements. Survive the change in seasons. Fight supernatural enemies. Assign your settlers essential roles for their society such as Builders, Farmers, Lumberjacks, Worshippers, and more.

GAME FEATURES


UNIQUE SETTLERS
Every settler is a unique person with their own traits, skills, and appearance. They will age, die, and can have their own families.

CREATE YOUR OWN FACTION
Choose your faction characteristics, their banners and their colors.

BASE BUILDING AND COLONY SIM ELEMENTS
Build fortified defensive structures to protect from enemies. Gather, manage, and use resources to build and expand your population.

YOU’RE THEIR GOD
Choose your starting powers and your moral alignment. Earn Mana and praise from your settlers to expand your sphere of influence and unlock new powers. (You can pick them up, carry them and, throw them too... if you want)

DANGERS AT NIGHT
Make sure your people are safe at night and make sure they have a roof above their heads. The darkness of night can make your settlers vulnerable to being attacked.

MACRO AND MICRO MANAGEMENT
Macro assign job roles for your settlers to follow, or micro-manage down to the decorations and customization of their villages and towns.

A NEW BEGINNING FOR YOUR PEOPLE
Your people were attacked by the Demon King and in their desperate pleas for help you were summoned to protect them. After rescuing as many as you could, you must help them rebuild.



EARLY ACCESS NOTE:
Little Islanders is currently in Pre-Alpha, Gameplay elements will change over development.
